title: Stochastic Processes

prerequisites.text: STA4029Z (Honours course in Advanced Probability Theory), or at the discretion of the Head of Department.

outline: The course aims to cover advanced concepts in stochastic processes and stochastic calculus, together with financial applications. Topics include: semimartingales, stochastic integration, Ito's formula, Feynman-Kac theorem, martingale representation, discrete trading, and continuous trading.
